title: MemoryPinnedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `memory_pinned` event — toggles a node's pinned state. Pinned nodes are exempt from decay pruning and phantom-certainty flagging. See spec/memory-delta-v1.md §5.3.

pinned.description: True when the node is now pinned, false when unpinned. Most-recent-event wins.
True when the node is now pinned, false when unpinned. Most-recent-event wins.
